Module com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida
Package com.example.miniproyecto_escritura_rapida.model.time

Interface ITimeManager

All Known Implementing Classes:
TimeManager
public interface ITimeManager
Interface defining the time management contract for the Escritura Rapida typing game. Provides methods for initializing, updating, and querying the countdown timer for each game level.
Since:
1.0
Version:
1.0
Author:
Juan JosÃ© Morera GÃ³mez
See Also:
  • TimeManager

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    decrementTime()
    Decrements the remaining time by one second.
    int
    getTimeLeft()
    Returns the remaining time for the current level in seconds.
    void
    initTime(int level)
    Initializes the countdown timer for the given level.
    boolean
    isTimeUp()
    Checks whether the countdown timer has reached zero.

  • Method Details

    • initTime

      void initTime(int level)
      Initializes the countdown timer for the given level. The time assigned decreases every 5 levels by a fixed reduction amount, down to a minimum value.
      Parameters:
      level - the current game level used to calculate the time for this level
      Since:
      1.0

    • decrementTime

      void decrementTime()
      Decrements the remaining time by one second.
      Since:
      1.0

    • isTimeUp

      boolean isTimeUp()
      Checks whether the countdown timer has reached zero.
      Returns:
      true if time is up, false otherwise
      Since:
      1.0

    • getTimeLeft

      int getTimeLeft()
      Returns the remaining time for the current level in seconds.
      Returns:
      the time left in seconds
      Since:
      1.0
